message:
Command `
echo "=== DRT STATUS $(date) ==="
RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
STEP70_LOG="$RUN_DIR/70-openroad-detailedrouting/openroad-detailedrouting.log"
stat "$STEP70_LOG" 2>/dev/null | grep -E "(Size|Modify)"
wc -l "$STEP70_LOG" 2>/dev/null
tail -5 "$STEP70_LOG" 2>/dev/null
ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
[ -n "$ORPID" ] && ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print "PID:"$2,"CPU:"$3"%","TIME:"$10}' || echo "EXITED"
ls "$RUN_DIR/final/" 2>/dev/null && echo "FINAL!" || echo "no final"
cat /tmp/drt_hourly.log 2>/dev/null | tail -3
` executed with exit code 0.

[ -n "$ORPID" ] && ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print "PID:"$2,"CPU:"$3"%","TIME:"$10}' || echo "EXITED"
ls "$RUN_DIR/final/" 2>/dev/null && echo "FINAL!" || echo "no final"
cat /tmp/drt_hourly.log 2>/dev/null | tail -3
", "timeout": 15}
function.name: execute_bash
